# oyaml

oyaml is a drop-in replacement for [PyYAML](http://pyyaml.org/wiki/PyYAML) which preserves dict ordering. Both Python 2 and Python 3 are supported. Just `pip install oyaml`, and import as shown below:

```python
import oyaml as yaml
```

You'll no longer be annoyed by screwed-up mappings when dumping/loading.
